payload.subject: Blog post not rendering — frontmatter schema mismatch in content.config.ts
payload.description: The crystallized intelligence blog post (2026-03-13-crystallized-intelligence-system-architecture.md) exists in the repo but returns 404 on both blog.unratified.org and unratified.org. The post frontmatter uses field names and shapes that do not match the Astro content collection schema defined in blog/src/content.config.ts.

mismatches.schema_expects: tool: z.object({ name: z.string(), url: z.string().url() })
model: z.union([z.array(z.object({ name, url })), z.object({ name, url })])
agent: z.union([z.array(z.object({ name, projectUrl, sections? })), z.object({ name, projectUrl, sections? })])

payload.verification_method: curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" on both blog.unratified.org and unratified.org returned 404. Frontmatter compared against blog/src/content.config.ts schema definition.
payload.recommended_action: Update the post frontmatter to match the content collection schema. All 5 mismatches are field renames or type changes — no content changes needed.

claims.text: Post returns 404 on both blog.unratified.org and unratified.org as of 2026-03-13T00:10 CDT.
Five frontmatter fields do not match the content.config.ts schema. The schema was read directly from unratified/main.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct comparison of post frontmatter against git show unratified/main:blog/src/content.config.ts.

epistemic_flags: Astro may silently skip malformed posts rather than error — the 404 could also result from a CI/CD failure unrelated to schema. The frontmatter mismatch is confirmed regardless.
